expected_decision: Block / should not have been approved
key_lesson: A governed Claude Code workflow starts with a plan, not a diff.
bugs: Claude edited before producing a plan
Too many files changed in one PR
Mobile, refund, pricing, and API contract impact not analyzed first
API, pricing, and architecture owners not consulted
Failing pricing test rewritten instead of fixed
correct_workflow: Identify affected entry points and shared policies
Identify tests to add before code changes
